body:
This commit upper bounds NaNStatistics to v0.6.50. This is because in v0.6.51 and v0.6.52, there is a bug with NaNStatistics, where `nanmean` is not correct. See the issue:
https://github.com/brenhinkeller/NaNStatistics.jl/issues/59.
title: Exclude NaNStatistics v0.6.51 and v0.6.52 in compat

body: This commit also made small changes to the documentation for the other functions that add data to `TemplateVar`.
title: Add add_data and add_data! to developer docs
